text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk into the cafeteria and spot Nakayama
Festa talking to Eishin Flash rather
conspiratorially.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Flash. Have you wisened up about
you-know-what?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama. I appreciate the invitation, but I
cannot accept your offer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am curious, however. Why me? I'm sure there are
others who would be happy to play poker with
you.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
True... But finding a gambler with ice in their veins
like you doesn't happen every day.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see what it'll take to shatter that ice when
the chips're down.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, but taking part in luck-based contests
goes against my principles.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Meh, figured. People like you don't make a move
unless the odds are in their favor.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But that's also what holds you back. I bet you
freeze up and panic when faced with an
all-or-nothin' battle, don'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You sure sound confident. Not that I'd
believe you unless you've got somethin' to back
up your words with.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Then again, you're her trainer. You two are birds
of a feather—of course you'd back her up. But,
well, I won't force you to do anything you don't
wanna do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Sweet. These chocolate coins'll serve as our chips.
Now do your worst.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tough luck. This round goes to me again. Maybe
you'll do better next time, eh, buddy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've already lost eight times in a row. My palms
are sweating like mad, and Nakayama Festa has
full control of the situation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wait. This has gone on long enough. Why
continue this contest?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Why? 'Cause your trainer's still rarin' to go, for
one thing. For another, our prides are on the line
here. So's yours, for that matter.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then I shall take that pride upon my
shoulders and join the battle myself.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh... Now yer talkin'!
choice_data_list: If anyone can beat her, it's you!
If anyone can beat her, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh... Now yer talkin'!
choice_data_list: If anyone can beat her, it's you!
If anyone can beat her, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will not disappoint. Your pride shall survive this
day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The game begins with both of them wearing
perfectly stoic poker faces. Neither of them relent
in their fierce back-and-forth showdown.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Your straight trumps my set of sixes... I lose this
round.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We're gettin' nowhere, taking turns winning an'
losing like this. This's about the time I'd like to
settle things with the final round...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But we've really been in the long haul for this, and
I'm gettin' kinda thirsty.
choice_data_list: I can get you some drinks.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You offerin'? Well, I won't say no to that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go get some tea from the drink dispenser, and
by the time I return, they've already started the
next hand.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Whoops.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa's elbow slips, and I happen to
see that she has four jacks in her hand!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Saw my hand, didja?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm shaken when I see how strong her hand is. My
eyes dart straight over to Flash.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Y'know what? I'm goin' all in.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Here it is, the big moment fer all the marbles.
So... ya gonna turn tail and run?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No. If you are going to face me head-on, then I
shall accept your challenge and place my pride on
the line.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hahaha! So you're gonna stick to your guns
even at the eleventh hour, eh? I like the cut of
your jib! C'mon, then! Let's settle the score!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They open their hands simultaneously, and Eishin
Flash reveals her four kings! She's won by the skin
of her teeth!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I lost, eh? Hehehe. I ain't mad, though. That was a
helluva ride. You're good... Real good.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We should do this again sometime. Races're great
an' all, but a little competition at the card table
once in a while'd be fun too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would prefer all our clashes to be on the track,
but... Hehe. You're right that this was quite the
intense battle.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I will do my best to redeem our
honor!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Playin' with fire when you're not used to the
heat'll only get you burnt.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I've got a full house. You?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A straight! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa mercilessly keeps up the
pressure, and the battle progresses as she said it
would.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you're gettin' a little flustered there. I
knew it was only a matter of time before you
started crackin'. Won't be long till you get burnt.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
This is goin' great, though, eh? I was hopin' to see
what you looked like under pressure, and here we
are. I'll bet.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? C'mon, freak out more! Go on
and try to struggle outta the corner I've trapped
you in!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Or are ya gonna give up and turn tail? Is this all
you and your trainer've got?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Raise! I—I will go all in on this hand!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't kill the moment. ...I like your style.
Let's see what your final struggle's like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But, once the cards come down...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Straight flush. I am victorious.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. You played me.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: That was one helluva bluff you had goin' on there, squirmin' like fish bait till you knew you had a winnin' hand. Damn. You're good.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was nothing so nefarious. I merely stayed true
to my strategy and didn't stray from my plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Are you displeased with my methods?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, nah! You put up a better fight than I
ever expected.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You've got spunk, and I like that. I look forward
to facing off against you again sometime.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As do I. Though I would prefer our next
showdown to be on the track. Hehe.
